name: nanashi
description: A lightweight utility package used in some of my projects.
author: Mario Plaza (36095) <me@mplaza.cl>

scripts.release: bumpp package.json --commit "chore: bump version to v%s" --tag --all --run "npm run build && git push && git push --tags && node -e \"const pkg = require('./package.json'); const { execSync } = require('child_process'); execSync('gh release create v' + pkg.version + ' --generate-notes', { stdio: 'inherit' }); console.log('GH Release created for v' + pkg.version);\""
